# Tokamak-zk-EVM

> Open-source CLI and monorepo that converts Tokamak Layer 2 transactions into zk-SNARK proofs.

## Primary Docs

- [README](README.md): Project overview, prerequisites, and CLI usage flow.
- [FAQ](docs/FAQ.md): Retrieval-friendly Q&A for common technical questions.
- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution workflow and coding standards.
- [Security](SECURITY.md): Vulnerability disclosure process.
- [Support](SUPPORT.md): Where to ask usage and troubleshooting questions.
- [Citation](CITATION.cff): Citation metadata for research and attribution.

## Core Packages

- [Synthesizer](packages/frontend/synthesizer/README.md): Converts transaction/state context into proving inputs.
- [QAP Compiler](packages/frontend/qap-compiler/README.md): Subcircuit library and compiler assets.
- [Backend](packages/backend/README.md): Setup, preprocess, prove, and verify implementations.

## Key Terms

- zkEVM
- zk-SNARK
- zero-knowledge proof
- Tokamak Layer 2
- Ethereum-compatible transactions
- transaction proving pipeline
